sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ بَيْنَ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ هُوَ سِرُّ نَجَاحِ أَيِّ مَشْرُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja među zaposlenima je tajna uspjeha bilo kojeg projekta.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation among employees is the secret to the success of any project.

sentences.arabic: نَجْتَمِعُ كُلَّ يَوْمِ اثْنَيْنِ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ الْأَفْكَارِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sastajemo se svakog ponedjeljka kako bismo razgovarali o novim idejama.
sentences.translationEn: We meet every Monday to discuss new ideas.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الْجَمِيعُ بَعْضَهُمْ بَعْضًا لِتَحْقِيقِ الْأَهْدَافِ الْمُشْتَرَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi pomažu jedni drugima kako bi ostvarili zajedničke ciljeve.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone helps each other to achieve the common goals.
